indications.text:
1.1 Relapsed or Refractory Acute Myeloid Leukemia
XOSPATA is indicated for the treatment of adult patients who have relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukemia (AML)
with a FMS-like tyrosine kinase 3 (FLT3) mutation as detected by an FDA-approved test.

1.1 Relapsed or Refractory Acute Myeloid Leukemia
XOSPATA is indicated for the treatment of adult patients who have relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukemia
(AML) with a FMS-like tyrosine kinase 3 (FLT3) mutation as detected by an FDA-approved test.
